change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: Activity 1.1.1. Support to establish/renovate school compound, WASH facility in schools (toilets, handwashing stations, pure drinking water, green gardening, solid waste management (grade ECED to grade 8). Activity 1.1.2. Support for classroom resourcing (p-foam, carpeting, furniture, print-rich classroom, diversified learning materials, cupboard, whiteboard, seating arrangement, book corner, audio-visual aids) together with teachers' competence development in its management (grade ECD to grade 8) Activity 1.1.3. Support to strengthen teachers' capacity  on gender transformative inclusive classroom management, inclusive pedagogy. Activity 1.1.4. Support to develop digital smart classroom setting through ICT lab/digital infrastructure/equipment and contents (smart TV/projector/laptop/memory sticks/solar system/internet connectivity/ICT lab, science/math lab and other innovative equipment) in school Activity 1.1.5. Support on STEAM approach in education are integrated in teaching and learning process and STEAM facilities are improved in school Activity 1.1.6. Support to develop/revise need-based SIP incorporating school safety, climate change adaptation, WASH, DRM, EiE, inclusion, girls' retention etc. components and establish functional complaint hearing mechanism, code of conduct etc. in school. Activity 1.1.7. Support to government for inclusive and integrated education policy/plan/strategies/guidelines/local curriculum/STEAM education, girls' retention components (Federal/provincial/local) including EiE system strengthening. Activity 1.2.1. Out of school children are identified and enrolled in Alternative learning classes (ALP) and then in regular school, children who receive ReAL support and relevant educational assistantship support.  Activity 1.2.2. Parental awareness and community engagement program by organizing parental awareness sessions, reading-corner-at-home, support peer-to-peer parental education program, reading fairs, extra-curricular activities for children etc. Activity 1.3.1. Provide soft, business and vocational knowledge and skill training on different vocation (need based and marketable)  Activity 1.3.2. Provide orientation to youths on policies and provision of government (employment related policy and program, insurance, subsidy etc.) along with coordination and collaboration meetings with government, private sectors . Activity 1.3.3. Provide support with climate smart tools/technology and training on climate smart agriculture. Activity 1.3.4. Provide start up support to youths and business promotion. Activity 1.3.5. Stablish linkage of youths with financial institutions. Activity 1.3.6. Inter-generational dialogue among parents, youths and stakeholders to make conducive environment (migration, gender, role of government for creation of employment and market linkage) and orientation to parents on important of women's economic empowerment  Activity 2.1.1: Support to conduct nutrition screening camp, early referral of identified cases and nutrition education sessions and follow up SAM/MAM cases Activity 2.1.2: Mapping of indigenous population and disadvantaged groups (VCA) and conduct tailored session on nutrition Activity 2.1.3: CSO & CBO network engagement in tackling nutritional issues within their community Activity 2.1.4: Nutrition awareness sessions in HMGs Activity 2.1.5: Provincial district and palika level consultation workshop on tackling malnutrition and promoting quality nutrition services Activity 2.1.6: Capacity building of health workers, HFOMC and FCHVs on WASH and nutrition Activity 2.1.7: Review of program at health facility, palika and district level Activity 2.1.8: Orientation to agriculture and livestock sector on their role to promote nutrient dense indigenous crops and Kitchen gardening Activity 2.1.9: Provide orientation and support SMC on promoting health, nutrition and WASH Activity 2.1.10: Strengthening of OTC/ITC centers and support to establish breastfeeding and nutrition corner Activity 2.1.11: Project induction training, documentation and review meeting on nutrition program. Activity 2.2.1: Training on importance of play and positive parenting education (ToT & FCHV level) Activity 2.2.2: Parenting education session conducted by FCHVs and ECD teachers on play matters Activity 2.2.3: Promotion of play through homebased play material development and play & stimulation corner at household level Activity 2.2.4: Training to facilitators on men's engagement in playful parenting Activity 2.2.5: Father's engagement in play and child development through regular sessions Activity 2.2.6: Support to establish child play and stimulation corners (health Facility, ECD centers and community levels) Activity 2.2.7: Play and stimulation promotion through regular HMGs meeting Activity 2.2.8: Support local government to prepare/revise local level ECD strategy & implementation procedure and strengthen ECD committee Activity 2.2.9: Documentation and review of program & learning

snapshot.executing_agency: Ministry of Home Affairs, Ministry of Women, Children and Senior Citizens, Ministry of Health and Population, Ministry of Education, Science and Technology
snapshot.implementing_agency: Rural Development Center, Human Rights Awareness Centre, Non Governmental Organisations

en.full: Sabal Balika Sabal Samudaya (SaBaSS) in Siraha, Saptari, Sarlahi, Kapilbastu, Bajura, Rolpa and Kanchanpur

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
